name: Romaine Lettuce with Oyster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the lettuce by washing and removing the core.
2. In a small saucepan, combine the peanut oil and oyster sauce. Bring to a simmer and keep hot until ready to serve.
3. Blanch the lettuce: Boil about 2 gallons of water in a large pot with an aluminum steamer basket. Once boiling, blanch the lettuce for approximately 20 seconds or until the leaves turn bright green. Remove from the heat, drain excess water, stack the leaves, and cut crosswise into four pieces.
4. Place the leaves on a serving platter and pour the hot oyster sauce over them. Serve.
